series_metadata.series_description: Form used by all regions and departments when sending records to stroage or imaging. These forms include a departmental box number, contents description, inclusive dates of records, and a destroy date which is in accordance with an approved record retention schedule.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If no electronic copy exists, retain until all boxes have been destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain until all boxes have been destroyed., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
